name: /postmortem --draft-rule scaffolds a rubric rule YAML at rubric/_draft/new-rule.yaml per the F-1 optional draft-rule clause
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/postmortem.sh" 'missing input check' --draft-rule 2>err.txt && [ -s rubric/_draft/new-rule.yaml ] && grep -q 'id: drafted-from-postmortem' rubric/_draft/new-rule.yaml && echo drafted 1>&2
